name: openaide
description: Local agent workbench for inspectable task execution.

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:typescript-deps && npm run build --workspace openaide-frontend && node scripts/sync-frontend-assets.mjs && npm run build --workspace openaide-vscode-extension
scripts.build:typescript-deps: npm run build --workspace @openaide/app-shell-contracts && npm run build --workspace @openaide/app-server-client
scripts.ci: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.check: npm run check:source-size && cargo check --workspace && npm run protocol:check && npm run build:typescript-deps && npm run check --workspaces --if-present && node scripts/check-app-server-client-dist-import.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:gate && npm run backend:test && npm run build:typescript-deps && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:gate: node --test --test-concurrency=1 deploy/local-web.test.mjs scripts/local-web.test.mjs scripts/production-source-policy.test.mjs scripts/redeploy-web-dev.test.mjs scripts/sync-frontend-assets.test.mjs scripts/test-workspace-gate.test.mjs
scripts.web:preview: OPENAIDE_WEB_PORT=5574 OPENAIDE_WEB_VITE_PORT=5573 OPENAIDE_WEB_STATE_ROOT=.openaide-web-preview/state OPENAIDE_WEB_RUNTIME_ROOT=.openaide-web-preview/runtime OPENAIDE_WEB_STATIC_ROOT=.openaide-web-preview/static OPENAIDE_WEB_PID_FILE=/tmp/openaide-web-preview-5574.pid OPENAIDE_WEB_LOG_FILE=/tmp/openaide-web-preview-5574.log OPENAIDE_WEB_ALLOWED_HOSTS=localhost,127.0.0.1 OPENAIDE_WEB_BUILD=1 bash deploy/local-web.sh restart
